query: Identify and count all aircraft visible on the apron. Compute the pairwise center to center distances between each airplane in meters (rounded to whole number), using the 0.0917 m/pixel resolution.
final_answer: There are 2 aircraft visible on the apron. The center-to-center distance between them is approximately 183 meters.

evaluation.question: Are there exactly 2 aircraft visible on the apron?
Is the computed center-to-center distance between the two aircraft within the range of 164 to 201 meters?
